title: Dog Bowl, Stainless Steel Pet Bowls Set of 2, Non Spill Water Dog Bowl for Large Dog and Cat, Replacement Kitten Food Bowls (22cm/8.6in)
features: [Health and Safety for your Pet]: Our stainless steel puppy bowls will use last long time and health than Plastic bowl, and dog bowls set of 2 are convenient to replacement any time. Also, our pet bowls are light and durable than heavier ceramic. So stainless steel is regarded to be the safest pet for water and food bowls.

[2-in-1 Food and Water Bowl Set]: Non spill dog bowl set of 2 can be used for wet food and dry food respectively. Or take as one pet Food and Water bowl. Avoid contamination and maintain hygiene. At the same time, this pet bowls is great for meat and canned wet food.

[Small Pets ideal Choice]: Our pet bowls design for small cats and dogs, perfect for short noses, small animals, even farm animals, suitable for use as pet feeding bowl and water bowl, ideal for kittens and adult cats.

[Replacement and Durable]: This pet bowls are made of high-quality stainless steel with a high-end polished finish that makes them sturdier, more durable, and have better stain-and rust-resistant performance. Compared with plastic or ceramic bowls, this one is absolutely a better alternative.

[Easy to Clean]: Dog bowls are a nice size and stable, easily to clean, washes easy in the dishwasher. Also, our dog bowls perfect replacement for raised bowl feeder and match with many brands' raised stands to meet your replacements.
description: Product Description When choosing an alternative bowl,please check carefully if the size of the bowl matches the size of the holder. Your pet should eat safe bowl with every meal ！！！ A bowl is just a bowl? Sadly, that's not the case！ Most cat dishes are made from plastic, ceramic.Plastic is the worst choice, it contains many unfriendly substances that continue to harm the body of pets.Ceramic is heavier and less durable,Accidentally your ceramic bowl shatters.Therefore stainless steel is regarded to be the safest material for water bowls and food. Wide range of applications Suitable for use as pet feeding bowl and water bowl, ideal for kittens/adult cats.are also suitable for dogs with short noses, small animals, and even farm animals,at the same time,These pet bowls are great for meat and canned wet food. Product Name:Stainless Steel Pet Bowls. Material:stainless steel. Product size:as the picture shows. Package includes: 2 *Stainless Steel Pet Bowls. Maintain Hygiene A set of 2 pieces can be used for wet food and dry food respectively.Or one pet bowl per pet! Avoid contamination and maintain hygiene. Perfect Design Deep enough to hold the wet food at a tilt but the sides are shallow enough to prevent whisker stress and avoid cat acne on the chin. They are sturdy enough for your cat to eat comfortably Easy to Clean A soak with dish detergent softens anything stuck to it, even dried food comes off easily after a short soak in hot water, so it is easy to clean by hand. And also completely safe in the dishwasher.
